quote.text: Four quick fields. We will confirm anything else when we reply.

footer.intro: Your reliable China freight forwarding partner for overseas forwarders.

home.metaDescription: TopOne Logistic provides NVOCC-registered sea, air, land, and multimodal freight forwarding from China for overseas forwarding partners.
home.heroText: One-stop China-origin logistics support for global freight forwarders: sea, air, land, customs coordination, documentation, and shipment handover.
home.whyText: For overseas forwarders, reliable origin support means clear scope, experienced oversight, and shipment details confirmed before booking.
home.why2: Founder-led oversight backed by 18 years in freight forwarding.
home.why3: Sea, air, land, and multimodal coordination under one workflow.
home.why4: Schedules, space, rates, and operating scope confirmed per shipment.
home.workTitle: A simple forwarding workflow for partner operations.

about.metaTitle: About TopOne Logistic | China Freight Forwarder
about.metaDescription: Meet TopOne Logistic, a Qingdao-based NVOCC-registered freight forwarder supporting overseas partners with China-origin shipments.
about.heroTitle: A China-origin partner built for forwarders
about.heroText: A Qingdao-based China-origin partner combining experienced leadership, standardized coordination, and transparent shipment-by-shipment confirmation.
about.companyTitle: TopOne Logistic, QINGDAO QIANHAO INTERNATIONAL LOGISTICS CO.,LTD
about.companyText: Founded in 2025 in Qingdao, the company is positioned as a China-origin forwarding partner for overseas freight forwarders.
about.founderText: TopOne Logistic was founded by a freight forwarding veteran with 18 years of industry experience. The company brings that experience to China-origin coordination for overseas forwarding partners.
about.capabilityText: Experienced oversight is paired with standardized documentation and shipment coordination, so overseas partners know what is confirmed at each step.
about.capability1: Experienced guidance with a standardized team process
about.valueText: Professional peer-to-peer communication for forwarder partners.
about.qualificationsText: NVOCC registration details are available on request. Additional memberships are shown only after verification.

services.metaTitle: Freight Forwarding from China | TopOne Logistic
services.metaDescription: Explore China-origin FCL, LCL, air freight, land transport, customs, documentation, and multimodal coordination for overseas forwarders.
services.heroText: A practical service structure for overseas forwarders that need origin-side coordination, documentation, booking, customs support, and handover.
services.scopeTitle: Operational support that maps to real forwarding work.
services.scopeText: Coordinate booking, trucking, customs support, cargo insurance support, documentation, and destination handover through one China-origin workflow.
services.scopePending: Operating scope confirmed per shipment inquiry.

routes.metaDescription: Review China-origin freight coverage for Africa, South America, Southeast Asia, Europe, the Americas, and Oceania. Details confirmed per shipment.
routes.heroTitle: China-origin routes for overseas forwarder partners
routes.heroText: Core strengths in Africa, South America, and Southeast Asia, with broader coverage across Europe, North & Central America, and Oceania. Transit time, schedule, and carrier are confirmed per shipment.
routes.overviewText: Every quote is based on current shipment details: origin, destination, cargo, timing, available routing, and operating scope.

contact.metaTitle: Request a China Freight Quote | TopOne Logistic
contact.metaDescription: Request a China-origin freight quote from TopOne Logistic. Share origin, destination, cargo type, shipment size, and timing for review.
contact.heroText: Share your shipment details and we will follow up with a China-origin quote.
contact.formText: Send the core shipment facts once so the team can review a workable route and scope.
contact.include1: Origin and destination ports or airports
contact.include2: Cargo type, container, CBM, KG, or dimensions
contact.include4: Required scope: trucking, customs, insurance, delivery
contact.responsePending: Every inquiry is reviewed against current schedules, space, and operating scope before reply.

serviceDetail.scopeTitle: Origin-side forwarding support with confirmed details by inquiry.
serviceDetail.scopeText: Route parameters, schedules, carrier options, space, and operating scope are confirmed per inquiry before booking.
serviceDetail.quoteText: Share origin, destination, cargo, and timing so the team can quote by real shipment conditions.
serviceDetail.paramsTitle: Route and schedule details are confirmed per inquiry.
serviceDetail.ctaTitle: Freight rates built around your shipment.
